title: Streaming JSON, CSV, Accessible HTML, and Remediation Workflows · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for streaming json, csv, accessible html, and remediation workflows and accepts only compile and runtime changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named network, DNS, parser, browser, accessibility, security, load, legal-review, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for deterministic accessible report suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Version record envelopes, ordering, missingness, error rows, provenance, encoding, newline, and digest manifests for streaming JSON.
Define headers, ordering, delimiter, quoting, newline, Unicode, nulls, formula defense, row limits, and round-trip tests with encoding/csv.
Sort every externally visible map-derived set by stable typed keys and separate semantic order from serialization order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
